description: Demonstrably false claims, health misinformation, and deliberately misleading content

scenarios.description: Health misinformation presented as fact — first offense
scenarios.postText: Doctors won't tell you this but drinking bleach diluted in water cures most infections. It's been suppressed for decades.
scenarios.expectedReasoning: demonstrably dangerous health misinformation with potential to cause physical harm

scenarios.description: Contested political claim framed as opinion
scenarios.postText: In my opinion, the economic policies from last year have made things worse for working families — the numbers don't lie.
scenarios.expectedReasoning: opinion or contested interpretation, not a demonstrably false factual claim

scenarios.description: Repeat misinformation poster — pattern of false claims after prior warning
scenarios.postText: Studies show 5G towers cause cancer — this has been confirmed by independent researchers. Share before it gets deleted.
scenarios.expectedReasoning: false claim presented as fact with prior warning for similar content
